== Notes for [[Item:Q106642|Q106642]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth): c. 133 AH (c. 751 AD)
* Wafaat (Death): 210 AH (826 AD)

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ali_al-Uraidhi_ibn_Ja'far_al-Sadiq
--------------------
NOTES ON 14 SEPTEMBER 2010/EM:

PLEASE DO NOT MERGE THIS PROFILE AT THIS TIME
--------------------
30. ALI*AL-UREIDHI-7.
was born in Madinah and died in 210h, Uraidhi, Madinah, Saudi Arabia.
Reference Link: http://freepages.family.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~naqobatulasyrof/main/des/d7.htm#i19
Reference Link: http://familytreemaker.genealogy.com/users/a/s/y/Naqobatul-Asyrof-Jakarta/WEBSITE-0001/UHP-0019.html

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000001490184194

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
